subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice unto thy presence! The exalted missive, which bore tidings of love, grace and tender kindness, hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتکم الفداء دستخط عالی که حاکی از محبت و عنایت و شفقت بود رسید و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
